title: The Veil Nebula in Hydrogen and Oxygen
explanation: A delicate web of glowing gas marks the expanding remnant of a supernova in Cygnus.

title: A Total Lunar Eclipse over the Sierra Subbetica
explanation: The fully eclipsed Moon glows copper-red above a limestone ridge line in the Cordoba uplands.

title: Jupiter and Its Great Red Spot
explanation: A sharpened amateur image reveals swirling bands and the famous storm.

title: Noctilucent Clouds at Midnight
explanation: Electric-blue clouds at the edge of space shine after sunset, a rare low-latitude sighting over Andalusia.

title: The Andromeda Galaxy Up Close
explanation: A mosaic of our nearest large galactic neighbor spanning six degrees of sky.

title: A Flight Through the Orion Nebula
explanation: A short visualization soars through the glowing star-forming region.

title: Saturn at Opposition
explanation: Rings tilted toward Earth catch the sunlight at the planet's closest approach.

title: Sunspot Region AR4012 in Close Up
explanation: A high-resolution view of a complex sunspot group near the solar limb.

title: The Heart and Soul Nebulae in Cassiopeia
explanation: Two vast clouds of glowing hydrogen frame a rich field of young star clusters.

title: A Crescent Moon Meets Venus at Dusk
explanation: The thin lunar crescent and brilliant Venus pair low above the olive groves of Baena.

title: The Pillars of Creation Revisited
explanation: Towering columns of cold gas and dust glow in the Eagle Nebula's star nursery.

title: Comet C/2025 R2 Sweeps Past Arcturus
explanation: A faint green coma trails a slender ion tail through the northern spring sky.

title: The Milky Way Arch over the Sierra Subbetica
explanation: The summer band of our galaxy spans the dark limestone horizon of Cordoba.

title: Star Trails Around Polaris
explanation: A long exposure reveals concentric arcs as the sky wheels about the north celestial pole.

title: The Lagoon Nebula in Narrowband
explanation: Glowing clouds of ionized gas reveal intricate filaments in this star-forming region.

title: Perseid Meteors over an Olive Farm
explanation: Bright streaks from the annual shower rain down above the rows of Finca Miles.

title: A Solar Prominence Erupts
explanation: A graceful loop of plasma arches above the limb of the active Sun.

title: The Pleiades and Surrounding Dust
explanation: Blue reflection nebulosity wraps the famous Seven Sisters open cluster.

title: Mars near the Beehive Cluster
explanation: The red planet glides past the open star cluster M44 in a wide-field view.

title: A Timelapse of the Setting Galactic Center
explanation: A short sequence follows the Milky Way core dipping toward the southern horizon.
